effect_description.de: 60% weniger Gesundheitsverlust wenn getroffen für 15 Minuten. Bei Blutungen wird der Effekt um 60% verlangsamt.
effect_description.it: Perdi il 60% di salute in meno quando colpito per 15 minuti. Se stai sanguinando, l'effetto è rallentato del 60%.
effect_description.en: You lose 60% less Health when struck for 15 minutes. If you're Bleeding, the effect is slowed by 60%.

effect_description.de: +7 Reiten und Hundeflüsterer für einen Tag. Hunde bemerken Heinrich gar nicht, andere Tiere reagieren messbar später.
effect_description.it: +7 Cavalcare e Sussurratore di Cani per un giorno. I cani non notano affatto Heinrich, altri animali reagiscono sensibilmente più tardi.
effect_description.en: Increases your Horsemanship and Houndmaster skills by 7 for 1 full day. Dogs won't notice Henry at all, while other animals will take measurably longer to react to him.

weak.de: +3 Reiten und Hundeflüsterer für 6 Stunden. Tiere beachten Heinrich weniger.
weak.it: +3 Cavalcare e Sussurratore di Cani per 6 ore. Gli animali prestano meno attenzione a Heinrich.
weak.en: Increases your Horsemanship and Houndmaster skills by 3 for 6 hours. Animals pay less attention to Henry.

standard.de: +3 Reiten und Hundeflüsterer für 12 Stunden. Tiere beachten Heinrich weniger.
standard.it: +3 Cavalcare e Sussurratore di Cani per 12 ore. Gli animali prestano meno attenzione a Heinrich.
standard.en: Increases your Horsemanship and Houndmaster skills by 3 for 12 hours. Animals pay less attention to Henry.

strong.en: Increases your Horsemanship and Houndmaster skills by 5 for 12 hours. Dogs won't notice Henry at all, while other animals will take measurably longer to react to him.

henrys.it: +7 Cavalcare e Sussurratore di Cani per un giorno. I cani non notano affatto Heinrich, altri animali reagiscono sensibilmente più tardi.
henrys.en: Increases your Horsemanship and Houndmaster skills by 7 for 1 full day. Dogs won't notice Henry at all, while other animals will take measurably longer to react to him.

effect_description.de: +7 Redekunst, 50% mehr Lesegeschwindigkeit und 50% mehr Erfahrung für zwei Tage.
effect_description.it: +7 Eloquenza, 50% in più di velocità di lettura e 50% in più di esperienza per due giorni.
effect_description.en: Your Speech goes up by 7, you can complete skill books much faster, and you get a 50% boost to earned experience for 2 days.

effect_description.de: Macht nüchtern, heilt Kater und unterdrückt vorübergehend die Auswirkungen von Trunksucht.
effect_description.it: Fa tornare sobri, cura la sbornia e sopprime temporaneamente gli effetti dell'alcolismo.
effect_description.en: Sobers you up, cures your hangover, and temporarily removes the effects of alcoholism.

standard.en: Decreases your current drunkenness or cures a hangover.

effect_description.de: Max. Ausdauerverlust bei Gesundheitsschaden um 75% reduziert für 25 Minuten. Verletzungen behindern Heinrichs Handlungen für die Dauer des Tranks nicht.
effect_description.it: La perdita massima di resistenza quando la salute viene persa è ridotta del 75% per 25 minuti. Le ferite non impediscono le azioni di Heinrich per la durata della pozione.
effect_description.en: Your maximum Stamina decreases 75% less than your health for 25 minutes. Injuries do not impede Henry's actions for the potion's duration.

henrys.it: Riduce l'energia a 0 e diminuisce la percezione. Le vittime subiscono il 50% di resistenza e rigenerazione in meno per un giorno.
henrys.en: Reduces Energy to 0 and lowers perception. Victims suffer 50% lower Stamina and Stamina regeneration for 24 hours.

effect_description.de: Vergiftete können nicht rennen und verlieren 110 Gesundheit in 15 Sekunden.
effect_description.it: Gli avvelenati non possono correre e perdono 110 salute in 15 secondi.
effect_description.en: Poisoned characters cannot run and lose 110 Health in 15 seconds.

effect_description.de: Erhöht Schießkunst um 8 für 15 Minuten. Zielen kostet während der Wirkdauer keine Ausdauer.
effect_description.it: Aumenta il tiro con arco di 8 per 15 minuti. Mirare non costa resistenza durante la durata.
effect_description.en: Increases Marksmanship by 8 for 15 minutes. While the potion lasts, aiming does not cost Stamina at all.

it.description: 1 x Erba di San Giovanni pestare

weak.de: Erhöht Schießkunst um 3 für 10 Minuten.
weak.it: Aumenta il tiro con arco di 3 per 10 minuti.
weak.en: Increases your Marksmanship by 3 for 10 minutes.

standard.de: Erhöht Schießkunst um 3 und senkt Ausdauerverbrauch beim Zielen um 20% für 10 Minuten.
standard.it: Aumenta il tiro con arco di 3 e riduce il costo resistenza nel mirare del 20% per 10 minuti.
standard.en: Increases your Marksmanship by 3 and lowers Stamina drain from aiming by 20% for 10 minutes.

effect_description.de: Erhöht Stärke um 6 für 15 Minuten. Zusätzlich kosten Angriff und Verteidigung 35% weniger Ausdauer.
effect_description.it: Aumenta la forza di 6 per 15 minuti. Inoltre, attacco e difesa costano il 35% in meno di resistenza.
effect_description.en: Increases Strength by 6 for 15 minutes. In addition, attack and defence cost 35% less Stamina.

effect_description.de: Speichert das Spiel, heilt 30 Gesundheit und erhöht Stärke, Vitalität und Agilität um 3 für 3 Minuten.
effect_description.it: Salva la partita, cura 30 salute e aumenta forza, vitalità e agilità di 3 per 3 minuti.
effect_description.en: Saves your game, restores 30 health, and boosts your Strength, Vitality, and Agility by 3 for 3 minutes.

weak.de: Speichert das Spiel. Du beginnst genau dort, wo du standest, als du den Schnaps getrunken hast.
weak.it: Salva la partita. Ricomincerai esattamente da dove ti trovavi quando hai bevuto la grappa.
weak.en: Saves your game. You'll start from exactly where you were standing when you drank the schnapps.

effect_description.en: 11 Soap, cleans clothes at a washing place

effect_description.de: Trank, der alle Spezialisierungspunkte zurücksetzen und eine Neuverteilung ermöglichen
effect_description.it: Pozione che azzera tutti i punti specializzazione e consente una nuova distribuzione.
effect_description.en: Potion that resets all specialisation points and allows them to be redistributed

effect_description.de: Lässt die beängstigenden Gedanken und boshaften Stimmen verstummen. Heilt über einen Zeitraum von 8 Stunden 75 Gesundheit, +3 Vitalität und nicht geblockte Treffer verursachen 10 % weniger Schaden.
effect_description.it: Zittisce i pensieri spaventosi e le voci maligne. Cura 75 punti salute in 8 ore, +3 vitalità e i colpi non bloccati infliggono il 10% di danni in meno.
effect_description.en: Silences frightening thoughts and malicious voices. Heals 75 health over 8 hours, +3 vitality and unblocked hits deal 10% less damage.

effect_description.de: Fieber und damit verbundene Komplikationen können oft zum Tod führen. Dieses Tonikum senkt das Fieber, wenn es rechtzeitig verabreicht wird.
effect_description.it: La febbre e le complicazioni correlate possono spesso portare alla morte. Questo tonico riduce la febbre se somministrato in tempo.
effect_description.en: Fever and related complications can often end in death. This tonic reduces fever if given in time.
